evidence_notes: Judged only catalog/owned_repair_batch67.json BOYSPH spherical buoy Chart No.1 parity repairs.
Used semantic_brief, s57_structure, chart1_parity_gate, Helm before/after SVG/renders, and OpenCPN provider renders from standard_source_table/owned batch metadata.

Pass requires spherical buoy body for BOYSPH rows except BOYSPH79, which must remain conical/nun per semantic metadata; required colour order/band count and BOYSPH65 vertical stripe cue must be present.
Minor Helm style differences versus OpenCPN pixels are allowed; this artifact grants zero final approvals.
